name: reboot-hub-dji-drone-specs-used-price-index
title: Reboot Hub DJI Drone Specs and Used Price Index: Q3 2026 Baseline
description: A public baseline package of DJI drone model references, observed Reboot Hub used listed bundle price ranges, repair-risk context, and pre-owned inspection metadata. Listed ranges are not final sale prices.

resources.name: sample-records
resources.title: Q3 2026 baseline sample records
resources.description: Example model, listed-price-range, and repair-risk records for the public package.

resources.name: record-schema
resources.title: JSON Schema for dataset records
resources.description: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 field definitions for records in this package.

resources.description: Citation metadata carrying the versioned Zenodo DOI.
